description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:5.6 Docker image. Set a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, installs git unzip nodejs -yqq, downloads Composer via curl, creates build/logs, runs php composer.phar install --no-progress --no-interaction --prefer-dist, and runs npm install --no-progress --production. Cache the vendor/ directory. Define a test job in the test stage that executes php composer.phar run test and then npm run test. Add a global after_script that uploads coverage to Coveralls with php ./vendor/bin/coveralls. No services, artifacts, or special rules are required.
